actions.value:
Thanks for reaching out and I apologize for the inconvenience.


The transaction is stuck pending due to a change with Dogecoin fees recently where it requires 1 Dogecoin for the transaction to process. Any amount less than that even if the mempool is clear will be ignored and not go through.


In regards to your current stuck transaction it will continue to remain Pending for a few days possibly a week before the transaction will automatically drop. Once the transaction is dropped the funds will automatically be back in your wallet as if it was never sent.


You'll need to simply wait til the transaction expires and the funds are returned to you. 



Let us know if you have any questions.
